headline: Assessing PTC (PTC) Valuation After A 12% Year To Date Share Price Decline
summary: PTC stock triggered review PTC (PTC) is on the radar after recent trading left the shares about 12% lower year to date. This move has prompted some investors to reassess how the company’s current valuation lines up with its fundamentals. See our latest analysis for PTC. Recent trading has been weak, with a 1-day share price return of 2.60% decline and a 90-day share price return of 14.66% decline, while the 3-year total shareholder return of 26.60% still reflects a stronger longer run. This...

headline: PTC Refocuses On Core Software With NVIDIA Tie Up And Buybacks
summary: PTC (NasdaqGS:PTC) has completed the divestiture of its Kepware and ThingWorx IoT businesses, reshaping its product focus. The company plans to use net proceeds to fund a sizable accelerated share repurchase program, returning capital to shareholders. PTC also introduced a new cloud native robotics design to simulation workflow linking Onshape with NVIDIA Isaac Sim, announced at NVIDIA GTC 2026. PTC, trading at $150.11, is pivoting further toward its core product development and industrial...
